title: IceMutation
description: It's a mod that turns the world into ice mutation.
body:
This mod completely changes the world. The game becomes more challenging, requiring more effort and extreme luck to find a suitable biome. 15 monsters, new wood types, and new tools have been added to the game. Item names are in English. To play the game better, you need mods that display recipes.

Also, look for hiding places at night and be careful, as some monsters can fly, climb, move through one block, and change their appearance. To avoid them and move more easily, a house can be built in the middle of the ocean or lake.

If you use the mod with biome changing mods the mod may break.

If the snow effects bother you, you can turn off the particles.

Every time the game receives an update, errors may occur in the names or the spawning of a few important creatures may be disrupted. Such errors will be corrected in future updates.

There may not be an update after 46.0.0 because the spawn system is down. If I fix it, I will be here with countless new features.
